privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.personalInfoDesc: We collect information you provide directly to us, including:
privacy.accountInfo: Account information (name, email, phone number, username)
privacy.feedback: Feedback, support requests, and other messages
privacy.automaticInfoDesc: When you use our services, we automatically collect:
privacy.deviceInfo: Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
privacy.locationData: Location data (GPS coordinates, Wi-Fi access points)
privacy.usageData: Usage data (pages visited, features used, time spent)
privacy.communityDataDesc: As a community safety platform, we collect and process:
privacy.locationReports: Location data associated with safety reports
privacy.aggregatedData: Aggregated and anonymized community safety trends
privacy.provideServices: Provide, maintain, and improve our community safety services
privacy.processReports: Process and verify safety reports and emergency alerts
privacy.personalize: Personalize your experience and provide relevant safety information
privacy.communicate: Communicate with you about your account and our services
privacy.security: Detect, prevent, and address security threats and fraudulent activity
privacy.legalCompliance: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms
privacy.analytics: Analyze usage patterns and improve our platform
privacy.emergencyResponse: Support emergency response efforts when appropriate
privacy.sharingIntro: We may share your information in the following circumstances:
privacy.emergencySharing: With emergency services when there is an imminent threat to safety
privacy.legalSharing: When required by law, court order, or government request
privacy.providerSharing: With trusted third-party service providers who assist our operations
privacy.businessSharing: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets
privacy.consentSharing: When you explicitly agree to the sharing
privacy.anonymousDesc: We may share anonymized, aggregated data that cannot identify individual users for research, analytics, and community safety insights.
privacy.securityIntro: We implement comprehensive security measures to protect your information:
privacy.accessControls: Strict access controls and authentication requirements
privacy.regularAudits: Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
privacy.employeeTraining: Employee training on data protection and privacy
privacy.incidentResponse: Incident response plans for data breaches
privacy.physicalSecurity: Physical security measures for our data centers
privacy.securityNote: However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.accessRight: Request a copy of your personal data
privacy.portabilityRight: Receive your data in a structured format
privacy.restrictionRight: Limit how we process your data
privacy.objectionRight: Object to processing based on legitimate interests
privacy.knowRight: Request information about data collection and use
privacy.optOutRight: Opt-out of data sales and sharing
privacy.exerciseRights: To exercise these rights, contact us using the information provided below. We will respond within the timeframes required by applicable law.
privacy.transfersIntro: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your own. We ensure appropriate safeguards:
privacy.adequacy: Transfers to countries with adequate data protection (EU adequacy decisions)
privacy.standardClauses: Standard contractual clauses approved by relevant authorities
privacy.bindingRules: Binding corporate rules for intra-group transfers
privacy.cookiesIntro: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience:
privacy.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use our services
privacy.securityDesc: Help protect against fraud and abuse
privacy.cookieSettings: You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings or our app settings.
privacy.childrenIntro: Our services are not intended for children under 13 years of age (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under this age.
privacy.childrenContact: If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child, we will take steps to delete such information promptly.
privacy.changesIntro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by:
privacy.appNotification: Displaying a prominent notice in the app
privacy.websitePosting: Posting the updated policy on our website
privacy.continueUsing: Your continued use of our services after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.footer: This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of [Your Jurisdiction] and is compliant with international data protection standards.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using HyperApp. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.
terms.acceptanceDesc: By accessing or using HyperApp, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
terms.ageRequirement: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum age required in your jurisdiction) to use our services.
terms.serviceDesc: HyperApp is a community safety platform that enables users to:
terms.shareSafety: Share real-time safety information and reports
terms.receiveAlerts: Receive community safety alerts and notifications
terms.accessData: Access aggregated community safety data and trends
terms.connectCommunity: Connect with local community safety initiatives
terms.emergencyReporting: Report safety concerns and emergency situations
terms.serviceChanges: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our services at any time.
terms.legalCapacity: Have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements
terms.notRestricted: Not be restricted from using our services under applicable laws
terms.provideAccurate: Provide accurate and complete information when creating an account
terms.accountSecurity: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account.
terms.accountTerminationDesc: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these terms or for other conduct that we determine to be harmful to our service or other users.
terms.permittedDesc: You may use HyperApp only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms.
terms.falseReports: Submit false, misleading, or fraudulent safety reports
terms.harassment: Harass, threaten, or intimidate other users
terms.inappropriate: Post inappropriate, offensive, or harmful content
terms.impersonation: Impersonate others or misrepresent your identity
terms.unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
terms.interference: Interfere with or disrupt our services
terms.violation: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
terms.abuse: Use our services for any abusive or malicious purpose
terms.contentLicense: By submitting content to HyperApp, you grant us a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, display, and distribute your content in connection with our services. You retain ownership of your content.
terms.contentRespDesc: You are solely responsible for the content you submit and the consequences of posting it. You represent and warrant that:
terms.contentAccurate: Your content is accurate and not misleading
terms.contentRights: You have the right to submit the content
terms.contentLegal: Your content does not violate any laws or rights
terms.contentAppropriate: Your content is appropriate for our community
terms.emergency911: HyperApp is NOT a replacement for emergency services. In case of immediate danger or emergency:
terms.callEmergency: Call your local emergency number (911, 112, etc.) immediately
terms.seekHelp: Seek immediate assistance from qualified professionals
terms.emergencyDisclaimer: HyperApp provides community safety information but cannot guarantee response times, accuracy of information, or availability of emergency services. We are not liable for any delays or failures in emergency response.
terms.asIsDesc: HyperApp is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
terms.accuracyDesc: While we strive for accuracy, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of user-generated content, safety information, or community reports. Users should exercise their own judgment and verify information independently.
terms.availabilityDesc: We do not guarantee that our services will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free. Service outages may occur due to maintenance, technical issues, or other factors beyond our control.
terms.liabilityDesc: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, HyperApp and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to:
terms.dataLoss: Loss of data, profits, or business opportunities
terms.inaccurateInfo: Reliance on inaccurate or incomplete information
terms.thirdPartyActions: Actions or omissions of third parties
terms.totalLiability: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount paid by you for our services in the twelve months preceding the claim.
terms.indemnificationDesc: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless HyperApp and its affiliates, officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, demands, losses, damages, costs, liabilities, and expenses (including reasonable attorneys' fees) arising out of or related to:
terms.userTermination: You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us or using the account deletion feature in settings.
terms.companyTermination: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for any violation of these terms.
terms.terminationEffect: Upon termination, your right to use our services ceases immediately. We may delete your account and data in accordance with our data retention policies.
terms.lawDesc: These Terms of Service shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [Your Jurisdiction], without regard to its conflict of law principles.
terms.jurisdiction: Any legal action or proceeding arising under these terms will be brought exclusively in the courts of [Your Jurisdiction], and you hereby consent to personal jurisdiction and venue therein.
terms.informalDesc: Before initiating formal dispute resolution, you agree to first contact us at legal@hyperapp.com to seek an informal resolution.
terms.arbitrationDesc: Any disputes arising out of or relating to these terms or our services that cannot be resolved informally shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of [Arbitration Organization].
terms.classActionDesc: You agree to resolve disputes only on an individual basis and waive your right to participate in class actions, collective actions, or representative proceedings.
terms.changesDesc: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of material changes by:
terms.appNotification: Posting a notice in the app
terms.websiteUpdate: Updating the effective date on our website
terms.continuedUse: Your continued use of HyperApp after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.footer: These Terms of Service constitute the entire agreement between you and HyperApp regarding the use of our services.
